fields.label: Max behavior slots
fields.description: Number of behavior definition slots available (each slot uses 5 bytes of RAM)

fields.label: Component: Gravity
fields.description: Compile the gravity component. Uncheck to save ROM if no behavior uses gravity.

fields.label: Component: Move horizontally
fields.description: Compile horizontal movement and wall collision. Uncheck to save ROM if no behavior moves horizontally.

fields.label: Component: Move vertically
fields.description: Compile vertical movement and floor/ceiling collision. Required for gravity to have a visible effect.

fields.label: Component: Turn at ledges
fields.description: Compile smart ledge detection. Requires 'Move horizontally'.

fields.label: Component: Turn at walls
fields.description: Compile velocity reversal on wall hits. When disabled, actors stop at walls instead.

fields.label: Component: Bounce on floor/ceiling
fields.description: Compile bounce physics (includes 32-bit math). When disabled, actors stop on floor/ceiling instead. Requires 'Move vertically'.

fields.label: Component: Attach to linked actor
fields.description: Compile linked actor following. Uncheck to save ROM if no behavior attaches actors to other actors.

fields.label: Component: Animation handling
fields.description: Compile automatic animation (face direction, idle, jump). Uncheck if you handle animations yourself.
